function.name: task_tracker

content: Task list updated for Chipgen Pnr agent.

task_list.title: Intake: extract all paths and parameters
EXECUTE wrapper macro hardening (librelane run)
task_list.notes: DRT running (PID 824793). Iter 2 in progress, ~80K DRC violations. RTL fixes applied: (1) JTAG->SWD, (2) 102 amuxbus ports removed, (3) CTS skipped, (4) FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS=false, (5) VDDIO bterm 24->1 pins. Pre-route WNS=-2015 ps. ~10-25h until GDS.

task_list.title: Verify wrapper macro outputs (GDS, LEF, LIB)
EXECUTE top-level chip PnR
task_list.notes: Chip config missing - create after wrapper completes

task_list.title: Generate PnR report with ACTUAL results
